label: Stock generator
description: Base schema for RimWorld stock generators. The concrete subclass is selected by the Class attribute on each <li> element. StockGenerator is abstract -- every entry must specify a Class.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StockGenerator subclass. Selects the generator strategy and the additional fields available for this list item.

countRange.label: Count range
countRange.description: Number of items to generate. Compact IntRange format min~max. Source default IntRange.Zero.

customCountRanges.label: Custom count ranges
customCountRanges.description: Per-ThingDef count overrides. Each child element name is a ThingDef defName; the text content is the IntRange override for that def.

totalPriceRange.label: Total price range
totalPriceRange.description: Target total market value range for generated items. Used as an alternative or complement to countRange. Source default FloatRange.Zero.

maxTechLevelGenerate.label: Max tech level (generate)
maxTechLevelGenerate.description: Maximum TechLevel of items this generator will include in its sell stock. Source default Archotech.

maxTechLevelBuy.label: Max tech level (buy)
maxTechLevelBuy.description: Maximum TechLevel of items this generator will buy from the player. Source default Archotech.

price.label: Price
price.description: Price tier applied to all things handled by this generator. Affects buy/sell price multipliers. Source default Normal.
